yaml
---
title: "The Invisible Crisis: Child Deprivation and Maternal Health Worldwide"
author: "Kalyani Girish Korpe"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    smooth-scroll: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Introduction
python

#| label: load-data
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

import polars as pl

ind1 = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_1.csv")
ind2 = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_2.csv")
meta = pl.read_csv("unicef_metadata.csv")

print(ind1.shape, ind2.shape, meta.shape)

#| label: eda
#| echo: true

# Quick overview
print(ind1.describe())
print(ind1.null_count())

# ind1: keep only "Total" sex rows to avoid double-counting
ind1_clean = ind1.filter(pl.col("sex") == "Total")
ind2_clean = ind2.filter(pl.col("sex") == "Total")

#| label: merge-data
#| echo: true

# Get most recent year per country for indicator 1
ind1_latest = (
    ind1_clean
    .sort("time_period", descending=True)
    .group_by("alpha_3_code")
    .first()
    .rename({"obs_value": "anc_pct", "time_period": "ind1_year"})
)

# Get most recent year per country for indicator 2
ind2_latest = (
    ind2_clean
    .sort("time_period", descending=True)
    .group_by("alpha_3_code")
    .first()
    .rename({"obs_value": "deprivation_pct", "time_period": "ind2_year"})
)

# Get most recent metadata per country
meta_latest = (
    meta
    .sort("year", descending=True)
    .group_by("alpha_3_code")
    .first()
    .rename({
        "GDP per capita (constant 2015 US$)": "gdp_per_capita",
        "Life expectancy at birth, total (years)": "life_expectancy",
        "Population, total": "population",
        "Birth rate, crude (per 1,000 people)": "birth_rate"
    })
)

# Master joined dataframe
master = (
    ind1_latest
    .join(ind2_latest.select(["alpha_3_code", "deprivation_pct"]),
          on="alpha_3_code", how="left")
    .join(meta_latest.select(["alpha_3_code", "gdp_per_capita",
                               "life_expectancy", "population", "birth_rate"]),
          on="alpha_3_code", how="left")
    .drop_nulls(subset=["anc_pct"])
)

#| label: timeseries-prep

# For the time-series chart: pick 5 representative countries
focus_countries = ["Nigeria", "India", "Bangladesh", "Ethiopia", "Brazil"]

ts_data = (
    ind1_clean
    .filter(pl.col("country").is_in(focus_countries))
    .select(["country", "time_period", "obs_value"])
    .sort("time_period")
)

from plotnine import *
import geopandas as gpd
import geodatasets
import pandas as pd

#| label: fig-worldmap
#| fig-cap: "Antenatal care coverage (%) by country — most recent year"
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

## The global picture

world = gpd.read_file(geodatasets.get_path("naturalearth.land"))
world_full = gpd.read_file(
    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvkelso/natural-earth-vector/master/geojson/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson"
)

# Merge master (converted to pandas for geopandas join)
master_pd = master.to_pandas()
map_data = world_full.merge(master_pd, left_on="ADM0_A3", right_on="alpha_3_code", how="left")

(
    ggplot(map_data)
    + geom_map(aes(fill="anc_pct"), color="white", size=0.1)
    + scale_fill_gradient(low="#fee5d9", high="#a50f15", na_value="#d0d0d0",
                          name="ANC 4+ visits (%)")
    + coord_fixed()
    + labs(title="Global antenatal care coverage",
           subtitle="Percentage of women attending 4+ antenatal visits",
           caption="Source: UNICEF")
    + theme_void()
    + theme(legend_position="bottom",
            plot_title=element_text(size=13, weight="bold"),
            plot_subtitle=element_text(size=10))
)

## Deprivation by country
#| label: fig-barchart
#| fig-cap: "Top 15 countries with highest child deprivation"
#| echo: true

bar_data = (
    master
    .drop_nulls(subset=["deprivation_pct"])
    .sort("deprivation_pct", descending=True)
    .head(15)
    .to_pandas()
)

(
    ggplot(bar_data, aes(x="reorder(country, deprivation_pct)", y="deprivation_pct"))
    + geom_col(fill="#c0392b", alpha=0.85)
    + coord_flip()
    + labs(title="Countries with highest child deprivation",
           x="", y="Children suffering 2+ deprivations (%)",
           caption="Source: UNICEF")
    + theme_minimal()
    + theme(plot_title=element_text(size=13, weight="bold"),
            axis_text_y=element_text(size=9))
)

## Wealth and healthcare
#| label: fig-scatter
#| fig-cap: "Relationship between GDP per capita and antenatal care coverage"
#| echo: true
#| warning: false

scatter_data = master.drop_nulls(subset=["gdp_per_capita", "anc_pct"]).to_pandas()

(
    ggplot(scatter_data, aes(x="gdp_per_capita", y="anc_pct"))
    + geom_point(aes(size="population"), alpha=0.5, color="#2980b9")
    + geom_smooth(method="lm", color="#e74c3c", se=True)
    + scale_x_log10(labels=lambda l: [f"${x:,.0f}" for x in l])
    + scale_size_continuous(name="Population", guide=False)
    + labs(title="Wealthier countries have better maternal healthcare",
           x="GDP per capita (log scale, constant 2015 USD)",
           y="Women attending 4+ antenatal visits (%)",
           caption="Source: UNICEF & World Bank")
    + theme_minimal()
    + theme(plot_title=element_text(size=13, weight="bold"))
)

## Progress over time
#| label: fig-timeseries
#| fig-cap: "Antenatal care coverage trends in selected countries"
#| echo: true

ts_pd = ts_data.to_pandas()

(
    ggplot(ts_pd, aes(x="time_period", y="obs_value", color="country", group="country"))
    + geom_line(size=1)
    + geom_point(size=2, alpha=0.7)
    + scale_color_brewer(type="qual", palette="Set2", name="Country")
    + labs(title="Trends in antenatal care coverage over time",
           x="Year", y="Women attending 4+ antenatal visits (%)",
           caption="Source: UNICEF")
    + theme_minimal()
    + theme(plot_title=element_text(size=13, weight="bold"),
            legend_position="right")
)

## Conclusion
